name: Ravintolalaiva m/s Bruno
description: Ravintolalaiva m/s Bruno on ainutlaatuinen laivaravintola Raisiossa Hahdenniemen venesatamassa. Brunon kannella voit seurata risteilijöiden rakentamista Meyerin telakalla nauttien herkullisesta ruoasta ja juomasta. Tervetuloa merelliseen ympäristöön!
extra_notes: BOAT restaurant on a ship — nautical/maritime atmosphere, view of Meyer Turku shipyard where cruise ships are built. Design: deep navy (#0a1628) background, white text, brass/gold (#c9a84c) accents, subtle rope/anchor motifs. Hero must use bruno_boat2.jpg as full-width background image. TWO locations: Bruno II in Turku next to Föri ferry, Bruno in Raisio at Hahdenniemi marina. Outdoor deck seating. Summer dining destination. Unique view of cruise ship construction.
